tasks.title: Write AccommodationReview schema + access verification tests

Write verification tests in `packages/schemas/test/entities/accommodationReview/accommodationReview.schema.test.ts` that assert: (1) `lifecycleState` field exists in `AccommodationReviewSchema` via `BaseLifecycleFields`, (2) field accepts DRAFT/ACTIVE/ARCHIVED, (3) defaults to ACTIVE on parse. Additionally in `accommodationReview.access.schema.test.ts` assert: (4) `AccommodationReviewPublicSchema` strips `lifecycleState`, (5) `AccommodationReviewProtectedSchema` strips `lifecycleState`, (6) `AccommodationReviewAdminSchema` preserves `lifecycleState`. These tests verify existing behavior (no code changes).

Files: `packages/schemas/test/entities/accommodationReview/accommodationReview.schema.test.ts`, `packages/schemas/test/entities/accommodationReview/accommodationReview.access.schema.test.ts`

tasks.title: Update OwnerPromotion Drizzle DB schema: remove isActive, add lifecycleState
tasks.description:
Update `packages/db/src/schemas/owner-promotion/owner_promotion.dbschema.ts`: (1) remove `isActive: boolean('is_active').notNull().default(true)` column, (2) add `lifecycleState: LifecycleStatusPgEnum('lifecycle_state').notNull().default('ACTIVE')`, (3) drop indexes `ownerPromotions_isActive_idx` and `ownerPromotions_ownerId_isActive_idx`, (4) add `ownerPromotions_lifecycleState_idx` (on lifecycleState) and `ownerPromotions_ownerId_lifecycleState_idx` (composite on ownerId, lifecycleState). Import `LifecycleStatusPgEnum` if not already imported.

Files: `packages/db/src/schemas/owner-promotion/owner_promotion.dbschema.ts`

COMPLETION NOTE: typecheck deferred to cascading tasks (T-007/T-011/T-014/T-015) — removing isActive column breaks consumer references until those tasks update them.

subtasks.title: Add lifecycleState column with NOT NULL DEFAULT ACTIVE
Add lifecycleState indexes (single + composite with ownerId)

tasks.title: Generate OwnerPromotion up migration (add column, data migration, drop is_active)
tasks.description:
Run `pnpm db:generate` from the db package to generate the Drizzle migration. Then manually edit the generated SQL file to ensure the sequence: (1) ADD COLUMN lifecycle_state with NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE' and PG enum type, (2) UPDATE owner_promotions SET lifecycle_state = CASE WHEN is_active THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'ARCHIVED' END, (3) DROP COLUMN is_active, (4) index changes. Place migration in `packages/db/migrations/`. Document the data migration step in a comment in the SQL file.

Files: new SQL migration file under `packages/db/migrations/`

subtasks.title: Edit generated SQL to add data migration between ADD and DROP
Verify indexes are correctly changed in SQL
Add comment documenting data migration rationale

tasks.title: Write OwnerPromotion down/rollback migration
tasks.description:
Write a manual rollback migration SQL file that: (1) ADD COLUMN is_active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, (2) UPDATE owner_promotions SET is_active = CASE WHEN lifecycle_state = 'ACTIVE' THEN true ELSE false END (DRAFT and ARCHIVED both map to false), (3) DROP COLUMN lifecycle_state, (4) restore original indexes. Follow the `manual/` migration pattern documented in `packages/db/docs/triggers-manifest.md`.

Files: new SQL rollback file under `packages/db/migrations/manual/`

subtasks.title: Write ADD COLUMN is_active with default true
Write DROP COLUMN lifecycle_state and restore indexes
Follow manual/ migration file naming convention

tasks.title: Write OwnerPromotion pre/post-migration data integrity tests
tasks.description:
Write integration tests that verify migration correctness: (1) pre-migration: count null values in is_active (should be 0), (2) post-migration: lifecycle_state has only 'ACTIVE' and 'ARCHIVED' values, counts match pre-migration true/false counts, (3) post-rollback: is_active values match the expected CASE mapping from lifecycle_state. Use the project's DB test infrastructure.

Files: `packages/db/test/migrations/owner-promotion-lifecycle.migration.test.ts`

subtasks.title: Set up migration test fixtures (seed records with is_active values)
Assert post-migration enum distribution matches pre-migration

tasks.title: Create archive-expired-promotions cron job handler
tasks.description:
Create `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/archive-expired-promotions.job.ts` following the `CronJobDefinition` pattern (reference `addon-expiry.job.ts`). Implement: (1) query `SELECT id FROM owner_promotions WHERE lifecycle_state = 'ACTIVE' AND valid_until IS NOT NULL AND valid_until < NOW() AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 100`, (2) UPDATE SET lifecycle_state = 'ARCHIVED', updated_at = NOW(), updated_by_id = NULL, (3) use pg_try_advisory_lock(43010), (4) support dry-run via ctx.dryRun, (5) log via @repo/logger with context `{ source: 'cron:archive-expired-promotions', count: N }`, (6) error reporting to Sentry. Timeout 60_000ms, schedule `'0 * * * *'`, name `'archive-expired-promotions'`.

Files: `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/archive-expired-promotions.job.ts`

subtasks.title: Create handler file with CronJobDefinition skeleton
Implement query with ACTIVE + valid_until expired + not deleted
Add structured logging and Sentry error reporting

(3) Write tests in `apps/api/test/cron/jobs/archive-expired-promotions.job.test.ts`: dry-run returns count without modification, actual run archives expired records, advisory lock prevents overlapping runs, empty batch handled correctly.

Files: `apps/api/src/cron/registry.ts`, `packages/db/docs/advisory-locks.md`, `apps/api/test/cron/jobs/archive-expired-promotions.job.test.ts`

tasks.title: Generate Sponsorship up migration (add-copy-drop for status rename)
tasks.description:
Run `pnpm db:generate` to generate the Drizzle migration for Sponsorship changes. Manually edit to ensure the sequence: (1) ADD COLUMN lifecycle_state with NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', (2) ADD COLUMN sponsorship_status with SponsorshipStatusPgEnum, (3) UPDATE sponsorships SET sponsorship_status = status, (4) DROP COLUMN status, (5) index changes. The PG enum type `SponsorshipStatusPgEnum` remains unchanged — only the column name changes.

Files: new SQL migration file under `packages/db/migrations/`

_replanLog.action: Split T-016 and T-018 into granular sub-tasks after admin UI scope analysis. T-017 retained but scope refined (toggle -> rename+payload).
_replanLog.reason: Original T-016/T-017/T-018 referenced dead code files and did not cover the LIVE route owner-promotions.tsx, types.ts, and component dialogs. Replan scope-corrects to cover actual UI migration needs and adds dead code cleanup + test fixture migration.
